changes.summary: New Puppeteer-based COI PDF renderer. Queries insurance.policy + insurance.policy_unit JOIN mdata.assets + org.companies. Renders HTML with carrier name, policy number, coverage type, term dates, covered units (unit code, type, year, make, model, VIN, insured value), total insured value. Returns { pdfBuffer, filename, mimeType, sha256 }. Read-only — no writes.

Added GET /api/v1/insurance/policies/:id/coi endpoint. RLS-scoped via withCompanyScope. Returns application/pdf with Content-Disposition: attachment. Returns 404 if policy not found, 500 on render failure. Read-only.
Added downloadInsuranceCoiPdf(policyId, operatingCompanyId) — raw fetch, blobs the PDF response, triggers browser download via createObjectURL. Added resolveApiUrl + ApiError to imports.
Added 'Download COI' button to policy detail header action row. Calls downloadInsuranceCoiPdf, shows loading state, shows error toast on failure.
Vitest unit tests for coi-pdf-renderer.service: null when policy not found, correct buffer/filename/sha256 when policy + units present, handles zero units, sanitises special chars in filename.
